description.zh: 基于1867年奥匈折中方案（Ausgleich），一位共同君主统辖两个平等的政治实体——奥地利（内莱塔尼亚）与匈牙利（外莱塔尼亚），共享外交、军事与财政，各自保留独立议会与政府。
description.en: Based on the 1867 Ausgleich (Compromise), a single monarch presides over two equal political entities — Austria (Cisleithania) and Hungary (Transleithania) — sharing foreign affairs, military, and finance while each retains its own parliament and government.
